---
title: ""
author: "Aleksandra"
date: "2026-06-28"
categories: [maths]
description: ""
image: "thumb.jpg"
title-block-banner: true
books:
  - title: ""
    author: ""
---

## Independent events

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

source("plot_helpers.R")

.GlobalEnv$.indep_events_engine_loaded <- FALSE

render_independent_plot(
  js_file        = "independent_events.js",
  instance       = "indep",
  controls_html  = create_independent_controls(
    instance = "indep", default_pA = 0.50, default_pB = 0.40
  ),
  container_html = create_independent_container(instance = "indep")
)
```

## Dependent events

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

.GlobalEnv$.dep_events_engine_loaded <- FALSE

render_dependent_plot(
  js_file        = "dependent_events.js",
  instance       = "dep",
  controls_html  = create_dependent_controls(
    instance = "dep", default_pSick = 0.10, default_pPosSick = 0.90, default_pPosH = 0.10
  ),
  container_html = create_dependent_container(instance = "dep")
)
```

## How often positive is actually sick?
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

render_bayes_plot(
  js_file        = "bayes_visual.js",
  dep_instance   = "dep",
  instance       = "bayes",
  container_html = create_bayes_container(instance = "bayes")
)
```
